home.experienceIntro: Product delivery, user experience, and creative leadership across SaaS, design, and large-scale student organizations.

experience.description: Led delivery across Audit Logs, Multiple Support Portals, and Empty State UX—from requirements and user stories through cross-functional release coordination.
experience.skills: PRDs · Jira · Product delivery · Cross-functional collaboration

experience.description: Translated user needs and business goals into user flows, wireframes, prototypes, and scalable product experiences in partnership with developers and stakeholders.
Led a four-tier creative team of 80+ students, trained 40+ coordinators, managed a ₹3L+ budget, and helped grow the festival’s social reach through design-led campaigns.
experience.skills: Creative leadership · Campaign strategy · Team management · Visual design
